Name: Frontend Developer
Description: Develops user interface and user experience

Name: Backend Developer
Description: Develops server-side logic and database integration
Competencies: A backend developer is expected to demonstrate strong competencies in designing and implementing scalable, service-oriented systems, with a focus on RESTful API development, clear interface contracts, and efficient data flow between services. This includes building robust integrations with external APIs and working with large language models (LLMs) using modern patterns such as retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), agent-based architectures, and modular context pipelines (e.g., MCP). The student should be proficient in data modeling and database management (e.g., PostgreSQL), including schema design, indexing strategies, and query optimization, as well as handling unstructured and semi-structured data for LLM workflows. A solid understanding of system architecture is required, including stateless design, concurrency control, caching strategies, and performance tuning. Additionally, the developer must implement secure authentication and authorization mechanisms, manage secrets, and ensure data privacy. Practical experience with testing, observability (logging, tracing, monitoring), and debugging is essential to maintain reliability in distributed environments. Familiarity with containerization, deployment pipelines, and cloud infrastructure further supports the ability to deliver production-ready systems. Overall, the student should be capable of orchestrating traditional backend components with AI-driven services into cohesive, maintainable, and efficient applications.
